ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "lastname" TEXT /* Student's last name */,
  "firstname" TEXT /* Student's first name */,
  "semester_entry" TEXT /* Entry term (F for Fall, S for Spring) */,
  "year_entry" INTEGER /* Year the student entered the university */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major the student is enrolled in */,
  "email" TEXT /* Student's email address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Student's date of birth */,
  "address" TEXT /* Student's home address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Student's contact phone number */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Student's gender */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Current enrollment status (e.g., Enrolled, Graduated, On Leave) */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary academic advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES advisors ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major (e.g., EECS, Math) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within which the major is offered */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Ph.D.) */,
  "total_credits_required" INTEGER /* Total credits required to graduate from the major */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major that the course is associated with */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_major_id FOREIGN KEY ("major_id") REFERENCES majors ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the student is enrolled */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of enrollment (e.g., Fall or Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade record */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Engineering, Mathematics) */,
  "head" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department (e.g., building and room number) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor */,
  "advisor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the advisor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the advisor belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location (e.g., building and room number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_advisors" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor assigned to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation" (
  "graduation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduation record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student graduating */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year of graduation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of graduation (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "date_graduated" TEXT /* Date when the student graduated */,
  "cumulative_gpa" TEXT /* Cumulative GPA at graduation */,
  "honors" TEXT /* Any honors or distinctions received at graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduation_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location (e.g., building and room number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)
